assertions.title: Requisição ao LM Studio usa stream: true

steps.observed: Test passed - payload confirmed to have stream=True

evidence.details: Captured payload confirms 'stream': True is sent to LM Studio in astream_chat_completion_with_thinking() method

assertions.title: Chunks SSE do LM Studio são parseados corretamente

steps.expected: data: {...} deserialized, data: [DONE] terminates, empty lines ignored

evidence.details: Tests cover: [DONE] sentinel termination, empty line handling, malformed JSON graceful handling, and empty stream scenarios

assertions.title: Conteúdo dentro de <thinking> é emitido como thinking tokens

steps.expected: Content inside <thinking> tags classified as ('thinking', token)
steps.observed: Test passed - thinking tokens correctly classified

evidence.details: Simulated chunks with <thinking>content</thinking> produced thinking tokens for content inside tags

assertions.title: Tag </thinking> encerra emissão de thinking tokens

steps.expected: Transition from inside_think to outside_think after </thinking>

evidence.details: Test with <thinking>A</thinking>B returned ('thinking', 'A') and ('response', 'B') - correct transition confirmed

assertions.title: Conteúdo após </thinking> é coletado como response

steps.expected: Response buffer accumulates content after </thinking> only
steps.observed: Tests passed - response buffer correctly excludes thinking content

evidence.details: Content after </thinking> correctly collected in response buffer; final LLM response contains only response tokens, no thinking content

assertions.title: Modelo sem <thinking> — fallback streaming as thinking

steps.expected: All tokens streamed as thinking when no <thinking> tags present

evidence.details: Stream without <thinking> tags produced only ('thinking', ...) tuples; response buffer contains full concatenation for models that don't emit thinking blocks

assertions.title: Tags <thinking> divididas entre chunks são tratadas corretamente

steps.expected: Split tags recognized correctly, fragments don't leak to response
steps.observed: Tests passed - split tag handling confirmed

evidence.details: Tested scenarios: '<thi' in chunk1 + 'nk>' in chunk2, and '</thi' in chunk1 + 'nk>' in chunk2. Partial tag fragments correctly not leaked to response stream

summary: Tested 7 assertions: All 7 passed (VAL-BE-001 through VAL-BE-007). Pytest execution completed successfully with exit code 0. Test files provide comprehensive coverage of streaming inference functionality including SSE parsing, thinking tag detection, state transitions, split tag handling, and fallback behavior for models without thinking blocks.
